headline: This is why Uber Technologies, Inc. (UBER) is a Top AI Stock, according to Billionaire David Tepper
summary: Uber Technologies Inc. (NYSE:UBER) is one of the best AI stocks to buy for 2026, according to billionaire David Tepper.
